changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Lost Item"

TextENGNew: ``Yeah, thanks for all your hard work. Sorry about what a big chore this is the day after the festival~!``
``Oh no, it's no problem at all! This is the home of our guardian god. We'll be punished if we don't sweep it up and straighten it out!``
``And I'm fired up from watching Rika-chama's performance yesterday~! We've always wanted to protect the shrine with our own hands, and this is finally a chance to do it!``
``Wa ha ha, that's certainly true~! ...Anyway, is Rika-chama doing okay? She's still resting because of her fever, right?``
``Whaaat? There's no need to worry. Dr. Irie said she'll be fine after a day of rest! Alright everyone, let's make this place look even cleaner than it was before the festival!``
``What is it, old man Shiina? Did you find something?``
``Well, there's something tucked behind this small shrine. A heavy bag... What's inside?``
``Ohh~? Wow, that looks pretty important. Whoever lost it must be really upset, huh?``
